headline: Guy's 'I'm Just A Philospher' Is Actually Just Him Asking 'Why' To Everything And Being Annoying
summary: 'Why do we need to meet at 3?' Jake asked. 'Because that's the time,' his friend said. 'But why?' Jake asked. He is no longer invited.
fullBody: Jake Philosopher questions everything. 'Why do we need doors?' Jake asked. 'To get in and out,' his friend said. 'But why?' Jake asked. His friends have stopped inviting him places. 'It's exhausting,' one said. Jake has started a philosophy podcast called 'But Why?' Episode 1: 'Why Podcast?' He has 2 listeners. 'Why listen?' he asked. The listeners left. 'I'm just curious,' Jake said. 'You're just annoying,' his friends said.
